images.prompt: Minimal flat illustration of a passport and a medical cross symbol side by side, representing the comparison between travel and health insurance. Clean modern design, white background, soft neutral colors with blue accents, no people, no text, professional utility style.

Minimal flat illustration of a slider or dial with dollar signs, representing choosing a deductible amount. Clean modern design, white background, soft neutral colors with blue accents, no people, no text, professional utility style.

Minimal flat illustration of a medical clipboard with a checkmark and a heart symbol, representing pre-existing conditions coverage. Clean modern design, white background, soft neutral colors with blue accents, no people, no text, professional utility style.

Minimal flat illustration of a bar chart or meter with a medical shield, representing coverage limits and maximums. Clean modern design, white background, soft neutral colors with blue accents, no people, no text, professional utility style.

Minimal flat illustration of a document with a checkmark and a globe, representing filing insurance claims from abroad. Clean modern design, white background, soft neutral colors with blue accents, no people, no text, professional utility style.

Minimal flat illustration of a helicopter and medical cross symbol, representing medical evacuation coverage. Clean modern design, white background, soft neutral colors with blue accents, no people, no text, professional utility style.
